languages.text: Eogunn applies {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}Galvanic Field{/g} for 1 round to an ally in a range equal to {uip|AbilityRange|823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2} cells, making them immune to Eogunn's ranged attacks and enabling ricochet to random enemies. Requires 1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Potential Energy{/g}, which is spent upon use.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn applies {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}Galvanic Field{/g} for 1 round to an ally in a range equal to {uip|AbilityRange|823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2} cells, making them immune to Eogunn's ranged attacks and enabling ricochet to random enemies. Requires 1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Potential Energy{/g}, which is spent upon use.

languages.text: Eogunn grants the effect of {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}Galvanic Field{/g} to an ally within {uip|AbilityRange|823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2} cells. That ally becomes immune to Eogunn's attacks, some types of which will always ricochet to random enemies. To use this ability, Eogunn must have at least 1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which is removed afterwards.
languages.original_text: Eogunn applies {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}Galvanic Field{/g} for 1 round to an ally in a range equal to {uip|AbilityRange|823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2} cells, making them immune to Eogunn's ranged attacks and enabling ricochet to random enemies. Requires 1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Potential Energy{/g}, which is spent upon use.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn applies the {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}galvanic field{/g} effect to himself or an ally within a {uip|AbilityRange|823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2}-cell radius for 1 round.

Eogunn grants the effect of {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}Galvanic Field{/g} to an ally within {uip|AbilityRange|823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2} cells. That ally becomes immune to Eogunn's attacks, some types of which will always ricochet to random enemies. To use this ability, Eogunn must have at least 1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which is removed afterwards.

Eogunn grants the effect of {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}Galvanic Field{/g} to an ally within {uip|AbilityRange|823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2} cells. That ally becomes immune to Eogunn's attacks, some types of which will always ricochet. To use this ability, Eogunn must have at least 1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which is removed afterwards.

Eogunn applies the {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}galvanic field{/g} effect to himself or an ally within a {uip|AbilityRange|823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2}-cell radius for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.

languages.text: Эоганн накладывает эффект {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}гальваническое поле{/g} на союзника в радиусе {uip|AbilityRange|823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2} клеток. Этот союзник получает иммунитет к атакам Эоганна. Некоторые типы атак всегда вызывают рикошет в случайных противников. Для использования этой способности у Эоганна должно быть не менее 1 уровня {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}потенциальной энергии{/g}. Он снимается после использования.
languages.original_text: Eogunn grants the effect of {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}Galvanic Field{/g} to an ally within {uip|AbilityRange|823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2} cells. That ally becomes immune to Eogunn's attacks, some types of which will always ricochet to random enemies. To use this ability, Eogunn must have at least 1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which is removed afterwards.

traits.locale_text: Эоганн накладывает эффект {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}гальваническое поле{/g} союзника в радиусе {uip|AbilityRange|823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2} клеток. Этот союзник получает иммунитет к атакам Эоганна. Некоторые типы атак всегда вызывают рикошет. Для использования этой способности у Эоганна должно быть не менее 1 уровня {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}потенциальной энергии{/g}{/g}. Он снимается после использования.

Эоганн накладывает эффект {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}гальваническое поле{/g} союзника в радиусе {uip|AbilityRange|823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2} клеток. Этот союзник получает иммунитет к атакам Эоганна. Некоторые типы атак всегда вызывают рикошет. Для использования этой способности у Эоганна должно быть не менее 1 уровня {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}потенциальной энергии{/g}{/g}. Он снимается после использования.

languages.text: Eogunn otorga el efecto de {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}Campo galvánico{/g} a un aliado en un radio de {uip|AbilityRange|823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2} casillas. Ese aliado se vuelve inmune a los ataques de Eogunn y algunos de ellos siempre rebotarán contra enemigos aleatorios. Para usar esta capacidad, Eogunn debe tener al menos 1 acumulación de {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}energía potencial{/g}, que se elimina tras su uso.
languages.original_text: Eogunn grants the effect of {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}Galvanic Field{/g} to an ally within {uip|AbilityRange|823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2} cells. That ally becomes immune to Eogunn's attacks, some types of which will always ricochet to random enemies. To use this ability, Eogunn must have at least 1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which is removed afterwards.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn otorga el efecto de {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}Campo galvánico{/g} a un aliado en un radio de {uip|AbilityRange|823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2} casillas. Ese aliado se vuelve inmune a los ataques de Eogunn y algunos de ellos siempre rebotarán contra enemigos aleatorios. Para usar esta capacidad, Eogunn debe tener al menos 1 acumulación de {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}energía potencial{/g}, que se elimina tras su uso.

Eogunn otorga el efecto de {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}Campo galvánico{/g} a un aliado en un radio de {uip|AbilityRange|823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2} casillas. Ese aliado se vuelve inmune a los ataques de Eogunn y algunos de ellos siempre rebotarán en él. Para usar esta capacidad, Eogunn debe tener al menos 1 acumulación de {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}energía potencial{/g}, que se elimina tras su uso.

languages.text: Eogunn gewährt einem Verbündeten in einem Radius von {uip|AbilityRange|823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2} Feldern den Effekt von {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}Galvanisches Feld{/g}. Der Verbündete ist dadurch immun gegen Eogunns Angriffe, von denen einige immer auf zufällige Gegner zurückgeworfen werden. Für den Einsatz dieser Fähigkeit braucht Eogunn mindestens 1 Stapel {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Potenzialenergie{/g}, die anschließend entfernt wird.
languages.original_text: Eogunn grants the effect of {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}Galvanic Field{/g} to an ally within {uip|AbilityRange|823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2} cells. That ally becomes immune to Eogunn's attacks, some types of which will always ricochet to random enemies. To use this ability, Eogunn must have at least 1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which is removed afterwards.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn gewährt einem Verbündeten in einem Radius von {uip|AbilityRange|823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2} Feldern den Effekt von {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}Galvanisches Feld{/g}. Der Verbündete ist dadurch immun gegen Eogunns Angriffe, von denen einige immer auf zufällige Gegner zurückgeworfen werden. Für den Einsatz dieser Fähigkeit braucht Eogunn mindestens 1 Stapel {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Potenzialenergie{/g}, die anschließend entfernt wird.

Eogunn gewährt einem Verbündeten in einem Radius von {uip|AbilityRange|823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2} Feldern den Effekt von {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}Galvanisches Feld{/g}. Der Verbündete ist dadurch immun gegen Eogunns Angriffe, von denen einige immer zurückgeworfen werden. Für den Einsatz dieser Fähigkeit braucht Eogunn mindestens 1 Stapel {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Potenzialenergie{/g}, die anschließend entfernt wird.

languages.text: Eogunn confère l'effet de {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}Champ galvanique{/g} à un allié dans un rayon de {uip|AbilityRange|823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2} cases. Cet allié devient insensible aux attaques d'Eogunn, dont certaines ricochent à coup sûr selon leur type vers un ennemi aléatoire. Pour utiliser cette capacité, Eogunn doit disposer d'au moins 1 cumul d'{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Énergie potentielle{/g}, qui sera consommé.
languages.original_text: Eogunn grants the effect of {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}Galvanic Field{/g} to an ally within {uip|AbilityRange|823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2} cells. That ally becomes immune to Eogunn's attacks, some types of which will always ricochet to random enemies. To use this ability, Eogunn must have at least 1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which is removed afterwards.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn confère l'effet de {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}Champ galvanique{/g} à un allié dans un rayon de {uip|AbilityRange|823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2} cases. Cet allié devient insensible aux attaques d'Eogunn, dont certaines ricochent à coup sûr selon leur type vers un ennemi aléatoire. Pour utiliser cette capacité, Eogunn doit disposer d'au moins 1 cumul d'{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Énergie potentielle{/g}, qui sera consommé.

Eogunn confère l'effet de {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}Champ galvanique{/g} à un allié dans un rayon de {uip|AbilityRange|823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2} cases. Cet allié devient insensible aux attaques d'Eogunn, dont certaines ricochent à coup sûr selon leur type. Pour utiliser cette capacité, Eogunn doit disposer d'au moins 1 cumul d'{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Énergie potentielle{/g}, qui sera consommé.

languages.text: Eogunn, en fazla {uip|AbilityRange|823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2} hücre uzaklıktaki bir dost birime {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}Galvanik Alan{/g} etkisi kazandırır. Bu dost birim, Eogunn'un saldırılarına karşı bağışık olur ve bu saldırı türlerinden bazıları her daim rastgele düşmanlara seker. Eogunn'un bu kabiliyeti kullanabilmesi için en az 1 {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potansiyel enerji{/g} birikimi olması gerekir ve kullanım sonrası bu potansiyel enerji ortadan kalkar.
languages.original_text: Eogunn grants the effect of {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}Galvanic Field{/g} to an ally within {uip|AbilityRange|823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2} cells. That ally becomes immune to Eogunn's attacks, some types of which will always ricochet to random enemies. To use this ability, Eogunn must have at least 1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which is removed afterwards.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn, en fazla {uip|AbilityRange|823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2} hücre uzaklıktaki bir dost birime {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}Galvanik Alan{/g} etkisi kazandırır. Bu dost birim, Eogunn'un saldırılarına karşı bağışık olur ve bu saldırı türlerinden bazıları her daim rastgele düşmanlara seker. Eogunn'un bu kabiliyeti kullanabilmesi için en az 1 {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potansiyel enerji{/g} birikimi olması gerekir ve kullanım sonrası bu potansiyel enerji ortadan kalkar.

Eogunn, en fazla {uip|AbilityRange|823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2} hücre uzaklıktaki bir dost birime {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}Galvanik Alan{/g} etkisi kazandırır. Bu dost birim, Eogunn'un saldırılarına karşı bağışık olur ve bu saldırı türlerinden bazıları her daim seker.
<i>Eogunn'un bu kabiliyeti kullanabilmesi için en az 1 {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potansiyel enerji{/g} birikimi olması gerekir ve kullanım sonrası bu potansiyel enerji ortadan kalkar.<i>

languages.text: 伊奥贡对{uip|AbilityRange|823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2}格内的一名盟友施加{g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}电激力场{/g}效果。该盟友将免疫伊奥贡的攻击伤害，其中某些类型的攻击必定触发跳弹攻击随机几名敌人。 伊奥贡至少拥有1层{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}势能{/g}，才能使用此能力，使用后消耗1层。
languages.original_text: Eogunn grants the effect of {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}Galvanic Field{/g} to an ally within {uip|AbilityRange|823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2} cells. That ally becomes immune to Eogunn's attacks, some types of which will always ricochet to random enemies. To use this ability, Eogunn must have at least 1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which is removed afterwards.

traits.locale_text: 伊奥贡对{uip|AbilityRange|823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2}格内的一名盟友施加{g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}电激力场{/g}效果。该盟友将免疫伊奥贡的攻击伤害，其中某些类型的攻击必定触发跳弹攻击随机几名敌人。 伊奥贡至少拥有1层{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}势能{/g}，才能使用此能力，使用后消耗1层。

languages.text: エオガンは{uip|AbilityRange|823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2}マス以内の味方に{g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}ガルヴァニック・フィールド{/g}の効果を付与する。その味方はエオガンの攻撃を受けなくなり、攻撃の一部の種類は必ず跳弾する。 このアビリティを使用するには、エオガンが少なくとも1スタックの{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}位置エネルギー{/g}を持っている必要があり、使用後に除去される。
languages.original_text: Eogunn grants the effect of {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}Galvanic Field{/g} to an ally within {uip|AbilityRange|823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2} cells. That ally becomes immune to Eogunn's attacks, some types of which will always ricochet. To use this ability, Eogunn must have at least 1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which is removed afterwards.

traits.locale_text: エオガンは{uip|AbilityRange|823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2}マス以内の味方に{g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}ガルヴァニック・フィールド{/g}の効果を付与する。その味方はエオガンの攻撃を受けなくなり、攻撃の一部の種類は必ず跳弾する。 このアビリティを使用するには、エオガンが少なくとも1スタックの{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}位置エネルギー{/g}を持っている必要があり、使用後に除去される。
